title: EMSC Felt Report Correction Procedure
author: European-Mediterranean Seismological Centre
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This short technical note describes how the values of felt reports collected by the European-Mediterranean Seismological Centre can be adjusted to bring them closer to the  EMS-98 macroseismic scale .
steps_raw: This short technical note describes how the values of felt reports collected by the European-Mediterranean Seismological Centre can be adjusted to bring them closer to the  EMS-98 macroseismic scale .
